docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5, INCL.

DEFENDANT MYRON LUI'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAY 8, 2014. ALTHOUGH THE MOTION WAS CONTINUED FROM APRIL 8, 2014 TO MAY 5, 2014, ON APRIL 18, 2014, PLAINTIFF FILED A NOTICE OF CONTINUANCE INFORMING DEFENDANT OF A CONTINUANCE DATE OF MAY 8, 2014. JUDGE: A. LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MYRON LUI'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO MAY 5, 2014 TO GIVE OPPOSING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. OPPOSING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN APRIL 8, 2014 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-05-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: PLAINTIFF DID NOT GIVE PROPER NOTICE THAT IT WILL BE APPEARING TO CONTEST THE TENTATIVE RULING. THEREFORE, THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED AS THE RULING OF THE COURT. DEFENDANT MYRON LUI'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. (CCP SEC. 473(D).) SERVICE WAS NOT PROPERLY EFFECTUATED ON DEFENDANT BECAUSE THE EVIDENCE ESTABLISHES THAT DEFENDANT DID NOT RESIDE AT THE ADDRESS WHERE THE SUBSTITUTE SERVICE OCCURRED. (SEE DECLARATION OF MORGAN LUI, PARS. 2-3.) FURTHER, "[I]T IS THE POLICY OF THE LAW TO FAVOR, WHENEVER POSSIBLE, A HEARING ON THE MERITS." (SHAMBLIN V. BRATTAIN (1988) 44 CAL.3D 474, 478.) DEFENDANT MAY FILE ITS PROPOSED ANSWER WITHIN 10 DAYS OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR# 5976.

No appearances.

DEFENDANT MYRON LUI Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories And Req. For Production Of Documents, And Req. For Sanctions is taken Off calendar per request of moving party. Judge Pro Tem: Thomas Cohen; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2014 Set For Trial On Oct-27-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Mtn To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar May-08-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Lisa J. Espada, Esq. of the Law Offices of Lisa J. Espada, Tel. 415.504.6195, for defendant and moving party;
Ruth H. Downes, Esq. of the Law Offices of Ruth H. Downes, Tel. 530.758.8029, appearing specially for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: Plaintiff did not give proper notice that it will be appearing to contest the tentative ruling. Therefore, the tentative ruling was adopted as the ruling of the court. DEFENDANT MYRON LUI's Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment is granted. (CCP sec. 473(d).) Service was not properly effectuated on Defendant because the evidence establishes that Defendant did not reside at the address where the substitute service occurred. (See Declaration of Morgan Lui, pars. 2-3.) Further, "[i]t is the policy of the law to favor, whenever possible, a hearing on the merits." (Shamblin v. Brattain (1988) 44 Cal.3d 474, 478.) Defendant may file its proposed answer within 10 days of entry of this order. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

Ntc Of Mtn To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar May-05-2014 Continued To May-08-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopted the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MYRON LUI'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment is continued on the court's own motion to May 8, 2014. Although the motion was continued from April 8, 2014 to May 5, 2014, on April 18, 2014, Plaintiff filed a notice of continuance informing Defendant of a continuance date of May 8, 2014. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

Ntc Of Mtn To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-08-2014 Continued To May-05-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MYRON LUI's Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment is continued to May 5, 2014 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than April 8, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
